---  
name: Feature Proposal  
about: Propose a new feature or change before writing any code  
labels: enhancement, proposal  
---

<!--  
Before opening a Feature Proposal, please read CONTRIBUTING.md. Pull  
requests opened without a prior, approved Feature Proposal are unlikely  
to be accepted.  
-->

## Problem statement

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who benefits? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How would you approach this? Be as specific as you can. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you think about, and why did you discard them? -->

## Scope

<!--  
Is this a small utility or a large architectural change? Roughly how  
much code is involved?  
-->

## Engine and platform compatibility

<!--  
- Does this depend on a specific Unreal Engine version or API?  
- Will it work across all platforms RigLogic supports?  
- Will it work for all MetaHuman characters, or only a subset?  
-->

## Additional context

<!-- Links to discussions, related issues, or any other relevant material. -->
